LMT.description: Builds fighter jets, missiles, and defense systems for the US military and allies.
LMT.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search LMT, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $649.16, enter 1 shares, click Submit

RTX.description: Makes missile defense systems, jet engines, and military electronics.
RTX.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search RTX, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $205.18, enter 6 shares, click Submit

LNG.description: Exports liquefied natural gas from US terminals to countries worldwide.
LNG.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search LNG, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $252.99, enter 4 shares, click Submit

GLD.description: An ETF that tracks the price of physical gold — a safe haven when markets are uncertain.
GLD.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search GLD, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $462.78, enter 2 shares, click Submit

ITA.description: An ETF that holds a basket of US defense and aerospace stocks.
ITA.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search ITA, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $230.21, enter 5 shares, click Submit

XOM.description: One of the world's largest oil and gas companies, produces and sells energy globally.
XOM.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search XOM, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $156.34, enter 7 shares, click Submit

CEG.description: The largest US producer of clean nuclear energy and operator of nuclear power plants.
CEG.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search CEG, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $301.62, enter 4 shares, click Submit

BAESY.description: A British defense company that makes armored vehicles, naval ships, and electronic warfare systems.
BAESY.fidelity_instructions: Go to Fidelity.com, search BAESY, click Buy, select Limit Order, set price to $123.00, enter 10 shares, click Submit

LMT.explanation: This is the day Lockheed Martin Corporation reports its profits. The stock can move 5-10% that day. You do not need to sell unless the dashboard tells you to.

RTX.explanation: This is the day RTX Corporation (Raytheon) reports its profits. The stock can move 5-10% that day. You do not need to sell unless the dashboard tells you to.

LNG.explanation: This is the day Cheniere Energy Inc reports its profits. The stock can move 5-10% that day. You do not need to sell unless the dashboard tells you to.

XOM.explanation: This is the day Exxon Mobil Corporation reports its profits. The stock can move 5-10% that day. You do not need to sell unless the dashboard tells you to.

CEG.explanation: This is the day Constellation Energy Corporation reports its profits. The stock can move 5-10% that day. You do not need to sell unless the dashboard tells you to.

BAESY.explanation: This is the day BAE Systems plc ADR reports its profits. The stock can move 5-10% that day. You do not need to sell unless the dashboard tells you to.

step5_shipping.plain_english: Using ZIM (a major shipping company) as a proxy for global shipping rates. ZIM is at $27.08, rising over the last 30 days from $22.2. Rising shipping stocks suggest global trade is active, which is generally good for commodity and energy plays.

step6_gpr.plain_english: Right now global risk is at 116.7. During the Gulf War it was 280. During 9/11 it was 350. We are currently moderately elevated. Normal is around 100.
